system.notes: Range-band attack bonus (Home of the Brave): +2 at Medium range, +3 at Long or Extreme; includes low-light optics and a rangefinder (thermographic optional). The bonus depends on the resolved range band, which no provider models yet — read the band off the fire dialog's rangefinding line and add the matching value as a free modifier. Earmarked: a band-conditional provider is feasible on the rangefinding seam.
